# Hearth Handbook

> Welcome packets and personalized neighborhood guides for real estate buyers — created by their realtor at closing.

Hearth Handbook is a B2B tool for realtors. Realtors create a personalized welcome packet (a printed QR card + a private live page) for each buyer at closing. The packet contains a hand-curated guide to the buyer's new town: restaurants, shops, services, parks, and local sponsor coupons. The town directories are not browsable to the public — buyers reach their handbook only via the QR code their realtor gives them.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview for realtors.
- [About](/about): Mission, coverage, and the team.
- [Sponsor](/sponsor): For local businesses — how to get listed in town directories inside packets.
- [Sign in](/login): Realtor sign-in.
- [Privacy](/privacy): How we handle data.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
